count.description: Only count matching keys, do not return meta-data.

limit.description: Return no more than this many results at once (see resume).

queryable.description: Only list keys that can/cannot be queries. Default is true.

resume.description: Continue returning results from previous call using this token (token should come from the previous call, resume cannot be used with other options).

resource_description: This resource lists all available statistics keys. Each <KEY> can be used in conjunction with /1/statistics/[current|history]?keys=<KEY>. The keys may change with a system update and the list of available keys may change with a system update.
